title: Twerk for Wood
description: When a player crouches/twerks near saplings, they have a chance of growing!
body:
Since the datapack Twerk for Trees has stopped having updates, I've asked the creator of it, if he was ok with me updating the pack, to which he respond with that it was ok with him.

It works with the following:
Oak
Spruce
Birch
Jungle
Dark Oak
Cherry
Acacia
(Flowering) Azalea
Mangrove
Pale Oak
Crimson
Warped

Note: If you install the datapack after placing saplings down, you must look at the sapling at least once for it to recognize it. Any saplings placed after installation will have the code on them.

Installation Guide:
-Download the datapack
-place the zipped folder inside the datapacks folder of the world you want to use it on
-relog into minecraft
Note: If you didn't get a message from me in your chat, then the datapack wasn't installed correctly, or you need to reload. If you've already reloaded, and you didn't receive the message in chat, then make sure you installed it correctly.

This datapack is great for any survival world, but perfect for Skyblock worlds, like my own called: TreeBlock

Let me know if you guys run into any problems, or if there is anything you want to see added...

If you are having issues with downloading the or installing the datapack, or any game play questions, you can easily chat with me via discord: https://discord.gg/9eWqwKk

Looking for game testers, Youtubers, etc...


If you use any part of this datapack, ask 1st for permission.

If you want to record this video for YouTube, or Twitch, or anything else, feel free. I'd love to see the gameplay. Also, make sure to add a link to this in the description!

DONATIONS
If you would be so kind to show me some love by donating to me on Paypal, we would really appreciate it, as these projects take a lot of time and effort to make, and I always deliver quality over quantity!

Donations can be sent to https://www.paypal.me/siresolo

If you are having issues with downloading the or installing the datapack, or any game play questions, you can easily chat with me via discord: https://discord.gg/9eWqwKk
